title: Boat Utilities
description: Add some utilities to the boats!
body:
![Boat Utilities Logo](https://ewanhowell.com/assets/images/resourcepacks/boat-utilities/logo.webp)
## Add some utilities to the boats!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/boat-utilities)




This resource pack makes boats more useful by adding some utilities to them! Boats will now include the following utilities on the front: - Compass - The red hand points north and the white hand points to the coordinates (0, 0) - Speedometer - Shows the speed the boat is currently travelling at - Clock - Shows the current in game time on a working 12 hour clockface
